source_pr.title: *: remove skip test
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #31716

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily removes conditional skips for race-enabled runs (e.g., `t.Skip("skip race test")` / `israce.RaceEnabled`) and adjusts some test expectations/config to make the tests runnable under `-race`. Skipping under race is not, by itself, evidence of a specific flaky root cause, and no concrete flaky failure signature is available here to justify a stronger classification.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
analysis:

Changed files (3): executor/analyze_test.go, planner/core/integration_partition_test.go, planner/core/plan_test.go

Picked test: type=unit path=executor/analyze_test.go name=analyze_test
